title: Iran Turns Out for Funeral for Those Killed in Strikes
summary_full: Some died in Iran, others on a sea far from home. They were honored together Wednesday at a procession in Tehran.
summary_public: Some died in Iran, others on a sea far from home. They were honored together Wednesday at a procession in Tehran.
